message:
fix(widgets): fix scrollbar thumb grab event bubbling and expose table sort/filter state

Scrollbar: return MouseResult::Scrolled instead of MouseResult::Ignored
when the user initially grabs the scrollbar thumb, preventing the click
event from bubbling up and triggering unintended actions in parent widgets.

Table: expose sort_column, sort_ascending, and filter fields as pub
(previously dead_code-suppressed private fields) so external consumers
can read sort/filter state for persistence or UI display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
